name: @jeswr/solid-odrl
description: ODRL usage-control policies for Solid resources + agent interactions (M3 of the agentic-Solid roadmap). Build an ODRL 2.2 Policy/Permission/Prohibition/Duty graph (the real W3C ODRL vocab, http://www.w3.org/ns/odrl/2/), serialise/parse it (Turtle/JSON-LD via the suite RDF libs), and evaluate it CLIENT-SIDE: given a policy + a request context (agent WebID, action, target, constraints like time/purpose) decide permit/deny/duty — pure, deterministic, testable. The expression + evaluation library; SERVER-SIDE enforcement (an authorizer beside WAC) is the CORE-PSS M5a item, NOT in this package. Experimental, AI-agent-generated.
author: Jesse Wright <jwrightwho@gmail.com>
